title: Dry Brazilian Lamb Satay
description: Savor the bold flavors of this Brazilian-inspired dish, featuring tender lamb skewers seasoned with a blend of spices and herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the Brazilian-style spice blend, garlic powder, and grated ginger.
Add the lamb strips to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb strips to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
Transfer the lamb to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, mix together the chopped green onions, chopped cilantro, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the green onion-cilantro mixture over the cooked lamb and toss to coat.
Serve the lamb skewers hot, garnished with additional cilantro and malagueta peppers if desired.
Enjoy as a snack or appetizer!
Note: If desired, serve with a side of Brazilian-style farofa (toasted manioc flour) or coconut rice.
